summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented. useTabs.ts now uses google.com as the primary proxy, HomeSearch.tsx uses google.com in its proxy label array, and TabContent.tsx has been updated. No allorigins.win references remain. However, several unrequested features were added, including a new ProxyInfoPanel component, a ProxyLinks page, and navigation changes.

hallucinated_features.description: A new ProxyInfoPanel component was created displaying proxy configuration details with expandable accordion sections, styled in amethyst/purple glassmorphism theme.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to replace allorigins.win with google.com in existing files. Creating a new ProxyInfoPanel component was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A new ProxyLinks page was added displaying three proxy service cards (ProxySite, ProxyOrb, ProxyProxy) with Launch buttons.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists adding new proxy providers or a provider selection UI as a non-goal. A ProxyLinks page was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Navigation was updated to include a seventh Proxy Links item with a Globe icon, and PageId type was extended to include proxy.
hallucinated_features.reason: No navigation changes were requested. The build request only required URL string replacements in useTabs.ts, HomeSearch.tsx, and TabContent.tsx.

hallucinated_features.description: App.tsx was updated to import and render the ProxyLinks page when activePage equals proxy.
hallucinated_features.reason: No changes to App.tsx were requested. This is a consequence of the unrequested ProxyLinks page addition.

hallucinated_features.description: ProxyInfoButton was added and integrated into HomeSearch.tsx to toggle the ProxyInfoPanel.
hallucinated_features.reason: Adding a UI button for proxy info was not requested. The build request only required updating the proxy URL string from allorigins.win to google.com.
